My Sewing Picks

Tools

The trusty gear that keeps every project precise — these are the cutters, mats, rulers and pressing helpers I reach for again and again.

The links below are affiliate links. As an Amazon Associate I earn from qualifying purchases.

Olfa 45mm Rotary Cutter

A sharp, comfortable rotary cutter for clean, accurate cuts through several layers of fabric at once.

View on Amazon

(paid link)

OLFA 24"x18" Self-Healing Rotary Cutting Mat

A self-healing mat that protects your table and keeps every rotary cut crisp and precise.

View on Amazon

(paid link)

Free Motion Sewing Machine Presser Foot (3 pcs, low shank)

A set of low-shank darning feet for smooth free-motion quilting and thread sketching.

View on Amazon

(paid link)

Complete Quilting Rulers Set (12.5 / 9.5 / 6.5 / 4.5 in + 6x12 + right triangle)

A full set of clear acrylic rulers for measuring, squaring up, and cutting quilt blocks accurately.

View on Amazon

(paid link)

Rowenta DA1560 Travel Compact Steam Iron

A lightweight, compact steam iron for crisp seams and pressing wherever you sew.

View on Amazon

(paid link)

Sewline Air-Erasable Fabric Pen

Marks your fabric clearly, then fades away on its own — no rinsing and no residue left behind.

View on Amazon

(paid link)
